---
title: "P1 now, P2-P4 later"
outcome: "Reader leaves knowing which modes ship this week and which wait."
---

# Roadmap (body heading — ignored because frontmatter title wins)

P1 ships edit mode for Stages 1 and 2 plus decision mode. Everything else
waits.

- P1 (this week): edit, decision, server export
- P2: annotate (pins on Stage-3 designed HTML)
- P3: assembly (Stage-4 reveal.js review)
- P4: orchestrator round-trip

The split is deliberate: ship the shell first, extend it later without a
rewrite.
